item.title: A Memorable Moment on the Farm
item.description: A day on the farm captures a unique moment during daily operations, highlighting rural life, equipment, and work in the field.

media:content.media:title: A Memorable Moment on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A day on the farm captures a unique moment during daily operations, highlighting rural life, equipment, and work in the field.

item.title: Hooking Up a Farm Trailer
item.description: A farm vehicle is carefully aligned and connected to a trailer as part of daily equipment setup and field preparation tasks.

media:content.media:title: Hooking Up a Farm Trailer
media:content.media:description: A farm vehicle is carefully aligned and connected to a trailer as part of daily equipment setup and field preparation tasks.

item.title: Taking On a Major Farm Project
item.description: A large farm task gets underway with heavy equipment, planning, and fieldwork as daily operations continue on the property.

media:content.media:title: Taking On a Major Farm Project
media:content.media:description: A large farm task gets underway with heavy equipment, planning, and fieldwork as daily operations continue on the property.

item.title: A Beautiful Day on the Farm
item.description: A peaceful farm moment highlights daily rural life, open fields, and the ongoing work that keeps the operation moving forward.

media:content.media:title: A Beautiful Day on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A peaceful farm moment highlights daily rural life, open fields, and the ongoing work that keeps the operation moving forward.

item.title: Flying a Crop Duster Over the Fields
item.description: A crop duster aircraft applies treatments over farmland, showing aerial agricultural work and precision flying across large fields.

media:content.media:title: Flying a Crop Duster Over the Fields
media:content.media:description: A crop duster aircraft applies treatments over farmland, showing aerial agricultural work and precision flying across large fields.

item.title: A New Day of Pivot Irrigation Work
item.description: Farm irrigation pivots are checked and operated across fields as part of daily water management and crop care routines.

media:content.media:title: A New Day of Pivot Irrigation Work
media:content.media:description: Farm irrigation pivots are checked and operated across fields as part of daily water management and crop care routines.

item.title: Starting the Day on the Farm
item.description: Farm operations begin with equipment checks and field preparation as a new day of agricultural work gets underway.

media:content.media:title: Starting the Day on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Farm operations begin with equipment checks and field preparation as a new day of agricultural work gets underway.

item.title: Starting Irrigation Pivots on the Farm
item.description: Getting irrigation pivots running for the season, preparing fields with water management systems to support healthy crop growth.

media:content.media:title: Starting Irrigation Pivots on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Getting irrigation pivots running for the season, preparing fields with water management systems to support healthy crop growth.

item.title: Driving a Case Tractor on the Farm
item.description: Operating a Case tractor during daily farm work, showcasing field tasks, machinery handling, and life during a busy farming season.

media:content.media:title: Driving a Case Tractor on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Operating a Case tractor during daily farm work, showcasing field tasks, machinery handling, and life during a busy farming season.

item.title: Getting the Farm Load Ready
item.description: Preparing and securing a farm load for transport, highlighting teamwork, equipment setup, and the logistics behind daily agricultural work.

media:content.media:title: Getting the Farm Load Ready
media:content.media:description: Preparing and securing a farm load for transport, highlighting teamwork, equipment setup, and the logistics behind daily agricultural work.

item.title: Beaver Dam Removal on the Farm
item.description: Removing a beaver dam to improve water flow and protect farmland, showcasing problem-solving and land management during farm operations.

media:content.media:title: Beaver Dam Removal on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Removing a beaver dam to improve water flow and protect farmland, showcasing problem-solving and land management during farm operations.
